creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Recently I've moved some of my boxes from httpd 2.0.x to 2.2.x; all works fine except this:
https://issues.apache.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=42829

Obviosly, I use 'prefork' as MPM. The used platform is FreeBSD AMD64, 7.1 RELENG.

It seems at present moment the last available port (httpd 2.2.11_4) stills suffering the bug. According to apache bugzilla docs, the attached patch in their web seems to work fine.

¿is there any plans to include this patch in short time?
